mapper.sql: select id, trace_id, request_id, biz_type, biz_name, biz_id, biz_key, op_type, result_status, success, error_code, error_msg, batch_flag, batch_count, class_name, method_name, method, request_uri, request_method, request_params, duration_ms, oper_user_id, oper_user_name, oper_nick_name, oper_dept_id, oper_dept_name, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_browser, oper_os, before_json, after_json, diff_json, extra_json, create_time from biz_audit_log
mapper.insert: insert into biz_audit_log ( trace_id, request_id, biz_type, biz_name, biz_id, biz_key, op_type, result_status, success, error_code, error_msg, batch_flag, batch_count, class_name, method_name, method, request_uri, request_method, request_params, duration_ms, oper_user_id, oper_user_name, oper_nick_name, oper_dept_id, oper_dept_name, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_browser, oper_os, before_json, after_json, diff_json, extra_json, create_time ) values ( #{traceId}, #{requestId}, #{bizType}, #{bizName}, #{bizId}, #{bizKey}, #{opType}, #{resultStatus}, #{success}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMsg}, #{batchFlag}, #{batchCount}, #{className}, #{methodName}, #{method}, #{requestUri}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestParams}, #{durationMs}, #{operUserId}, #{operUserName}, #{operNickName}, #{operDeptId}, #{operDeptName}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{operBrowser}, #{operOs}, #{beforeJson}, #{afterJson}, #{diffJson}, #{extraJson}, now() )

insert into biz_audit_log_detail ( log_id, item_path, item_key, item_biz_id, item_name, seq_no, change_type, before_json, after_json, diff_json, success, error_msg, create_time ) values
( #{item.logId}, #{item.itemPath}, #{item.itemKey}, #{item.itemBizId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.seqNo}, #{item.changeType}, #{item.beforeJson}, #{item.afterJson}, #{item.diffJson}, #{item.success}, #{item.errorMsg}, now() )
mapper.select: select id, log_id, item_path, item_key, item_biz_id, item_name, seq_no, change_type, before_json, after_json, diff_json, success, error_msg, create_time from biz_audit_log_detail where log_id = #{logId} order by seq_no asc, id asc
mapper.delete:
delete from biz_audit_log where id in
#{id}

delete from biz_audit_log_detail where log_id in
#{id}
delete from biz_audit_log where create_time < DATE_SUB(now(), interval ${days} day)
delete d from biz_audit_log_detail d inner join biz_audit_log l on l.id = d.log_id where l.create_time < DATE_SUB(now(), interval ${days} day)
